messages.content: when will the large basket rack be available. it is showing that it is currently out of stockl

We don't currently have a confirmed restock date for the large basket rack. You can call us at (952) 283-0777 during business hours (Mon-Fri 8:30am-4:30pm CST) to be added to our pre-order list when it arrives.
if you have the rack platform on the bike will the large basket rack mount to it as well?

Yes, the large basket rack is designed to mount onto the existing rack platform on your bike. It should fit securely without any issues. If you have any specific concerns about your bike model, feel free to ask!
can you have both rack platform r144 and the large basket rack on the bike at the same time?

No, you cannot have both the rack platform R144 and the large basket rack mounted on the bike at the same time. The large basket rack is designed to replace the existing rack platform, so they cannot be used together.
does the megatron come with two batterys?
The Megatron 4.0 comes with one battery by default. However, you can opt for a dual battery add-on for extended range. If you're interested in that option, let me know!
